test.name: Deve realizar o login com sucesso

kw.name: Start session
Carregar Variaveis De Ambiente
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
Carrega o arquivo .env e cria as variáveis globais para o teste.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.msg: Retrying (Retry(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='127.0.0.1', port=4723): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused")': /session

Retrying (Retry(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='127.0.0.1', port=4723): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused")': /session

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open

MaxRetryError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='127.0.0.1', port=4723): Max retries exceeded with url: /session (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='127.0.0.1', port=4723): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

kw.name: Close All Applications
kw.doc: Closes all open applications.
